case_title: MICHAEL COGLIANDRO,JR VS. INTEGRATED MORTGAGE CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT INTEGRATED MORTGAGE CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF COGLIANDRO JR, MICHAEL
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT INTEGRATED MORTGAGE CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF COGLIANDRO JR, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT INTEGRATED MORTGAGE CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COGLIANDRO JR, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTEGRATED MORTGAGE CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $8,681.10 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,881.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
